title: Core Elements of the Ethereum Blockchain
description: A structural breakdown of the key components that make up the Ethereum blockchain and their hierarchical relationships.
relationships: A Block contains a Block Header and a list of Transactions
The Block Header contains a State Root, which is a cryptographic hash of the entire system state
Transactions can trigger the execution of a Smart Contract
Smart Contracts are stored within an Account on the state
Each Transaction execution consumes Gas and generates a Transaction Receipt logged in the block
